name: Sauteed Apples, Onions, & Pears Over Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry Sherry or Apple Juice
1 Package of Fresh Spinach, Washed & Trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the honey, white wine vinegar, dry sherry or apple juice, lemon juice, salt, ground white pepper, and dried thyme (if using) in a bowl.
2. Separate the onion into rings.
3. Cook the onion rings in a large skillet over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until tender.
4. Add the pear, cooking apple, and honey mixture to the skillet. Stir often.
5. Continue cooking for 5 to 6 minutes or until the fruit is tender and the liquid has slightly thickened.
6. Serve the sauteed apples, onions, and pears over fresh spinach.
